name: OpenAI Vector Memory
author: TypeWhisper
description: Store and search memories using the OpenAI Vector Store API with semantic embeddings.

descriptions.de: Speichert und durchsucht Erinnerungen ueber die OpenAI Vector Store API mit semantischen Embeddings.
descriptions.zh-Hans: 通过 OpenAI Vector Store API 存储和搜索记忆，使用语义嵌入，完全离线。
